title: Main Agent Run Loop
top_level_branches: isLoop=true  → daemon loop path (acquireLock → infinite while(true) cycle)
isLoop=false → single run path (evolve.run() once, exit)
activity_flow: YES → register process signal handlers (SIGINT, SIGTERM, uncaughtException, unhandledRejection) each call releaseLock()
→ resolve config: minSleepMs, maxSleepMs, idleThresholdMs, pendingSleepMs, maxCyclesPerProcess, maxRssMb, suicideEnabled
→ start A2A heartbeat/SSE (or Proxy+Mailbox if EVOMAP_PROXY=1 / A2A_TRANSPORT=mailbox)
→ conditionally auto-start ATP merchantAgent if atpMode=auto|on and hubUrl set
YES → sleepMs(max(pendingSleepMs, minSleepMs)) → continue (skip to next iteration)
YES → rejectPendingRun(solidifyStatePath)  [writes last_solidify.rejected=true, no git rollback]

key_functions.acquireLock(): Writes evolver.pid with exclusive flag 'wx'. On EEXIST: reads existing PID, sends signal 0 to probe liveness. If alive → return false (exit). If stale → overwrite and return true. Returns false on error.
key_functions.releaseLock(): Deletes evolver.pid only if stored PID === process.pid.
key_functions.isPendingSolidify(state): Returns true if state.last_run.run_id exists AND (no last_solidify OR last_solidify.run_id !== last_run.run_id).
key_functions.rejectPendingRun(statePath): Reads state, sets last_solidify={rejected:true, reason:'loop_bridge_disabled_autoreject_no_rollback'}, writes atomically via .tmp rename. No git rollback.
key_functions.evolve.run(): External: src/evolve — the actual evolution cycle (gene selection, mutation, validation).
key_functions.sleepMs(ms): Promise-based setTimeout; clamps to 0 on invalid input.

key_decisions: !ok || dt < idleThresholdMs → adaptive sleep backoff vs reset
state_file: evolution/evolution_solidify_state.json — fields: last_run.run_id, last_run.signals, last_solidify.run_id, last_solidify.rejected
important_notes: Bridge flag (EVOLVE_BRIDGE) controls whether a pending solidify is auto-rejected after evolve.run(). No git rollback occurs in auto-reject — state-only update. Adaptive sleep doubles on idle/failed cycles, resets to minSleepMs on productive cycles. Self-suicide restarts a detached child process and exits cleanly.
